_comment: Symbol -> IG epic mapping for paper-traded equities / ETFs. Populate the `epic` field by hitting IG /gateway/deal/markets?searchTerm=<symbol> against demo creds; pick the epic whose instrumentName matches the listing you intend to trade. Entries with `epic: null` are intentionally unusable; the strategy will refuse to route them (IGEpicMissingError). The seed below is the phase-0 candidate basket (5 liquid US ETFs). See ig_epic_map.py for the loader contract.

SPY.notes: Seed entry; epic TBD. Try searchTerm=SPY; pick the US-listed cash ETF row.

QQQ.notes: Seed entry; epic TBD. Try searchTerm=QQQ.

IWM.notes: Seed entry; epic TBD. Try searchTerm=IWM.

DIA.instrument_name: SPDR Dow Jones Industrial Average ETF
DIA.notes: Seed entry; epic TBD. Try searchTerm=DIA.

XLF.notes: Seed entry; epic TBD. Try searchTerm=XLF.
